title: Error Context
text: Error Context Displays the contents of $procerrorcontext whenever a ProcScript error occurs ( $procerror < 0). The Error Context window shows the context of only the latest ProcScript error. Topic items Displays the topic items of the latest ProcScript error, that is, the constant parts of $procerrorcontext . These items are: ERROR MNEM Description Component Procname Trigger Line ADDITIONAL Description Displays a short description of each topic item of the ProcScript error. This description is the variable part of the $procerrorcontext associative list. Related Links $procerrorcontext Return the location of the error specified by $procerror. $procerror Return the reason for an error in ProcScript execution. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
